agent_runs.reason: Generic spans do not guarantee an agent-run boundary.

model_calls.reason: Only explicitly typed AgentLint model spans are recognized.

tool_calls.reason: Only explicitly typed AgentLint tool spans are recognized.

tool_arguments.reason: Arguments require a valid explicit JSON attribute.

tool_results.reason: Results require explicitly typed AgentLint result spans.

approvals.reason: Approvals require explicit AgentLint approval attributes.

data_flow.reason: Only explicit AgentLint data-flow edges are preserved.

provenance.reason: Only explicit claims and provenance edges are preserved.

final_answers.reason: Only explicitly typed final-answer spans are recognized.
